operationKinds.purpose: Create or update the buyer/requester/provider contact with service, offer, and attribution context.
operationKinds.manualFallback: Create a contact manually and paste the Erie.Pro action ID into the notes/custom field.

operationKinds.purpose: Attach provider/business context so service delivery can be managed by company, not only person.
operationKinds.manualFallback: Create or tag the provider/company contact and link it to the customer contact.

operationKinds.purpose: Open the operational workspace for fulfillment, routing, or onboarding.
operationKinds.manualFallback: Create a SuiteDash project using the operation title and copy all payload fields into notes.

operationKinds.purpose: Prepare the customer/provider portal for deliverables, files, and onboarding context.
operationKinds.manualFallback: Enable portal access from the contact/project once the matching template is configured.

operationKinds.purpose: Create a recoverable support/revenue record for urgent fulfillment, refunds, failed payments, and cancellations.
operationKinds.manualFallback: Create a ticket with the action title, body, and source URL.

operationKinds.purpose: Create the concrete task queue item so every event becomes deliver, recover, route, or learn work.
operationKinds.manualFallback: Create a task under the project and paste the idempotency key into the task description.

pollViews.name: SuiteDash deliver actions
pollViews.purpose: Paid purchases that need SuiteDash contact, project, portal, and fulfillment task work.

pollViews.name: SuiteDash route actions
pollViews.purpose: Context-routing actions where SuiteDash is owner or downstream operations record.

pollViews.name: SuiteDash recovery actions
pollViews.purpose: Refund, cancellation, failed-payment, and abandoned-cart follow-up records.
